## InMemoryCommandArchiveStore Class

In\-memory implementation of [Hexalith\.EventStore\.Server\.Commands\.ICommandArchiveStore](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/hexalith.eventstore.server.commands.icommandarchivestore 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Server\.Commands\.ICommandArchiveStore') for testing\.
Simulates TTL expiry using stored expiration timestamps\.
